chunks.title: Promise of Redemption and Gathering
chunks.reason: A unified speech where God addresses Jacob and Israel with promises of redemption and gathering from all directions.

chunks.title: Witnesses and Judgment on Nations
chunks.reason: An oracle calling the blind to witness God's power, identifying Israel as His witnesses, and declaring judgment on Babylon.

chunks.title: Call to Remember the New Thing
chunks.reason: An exhortation urging the people to forget past events and recognize God's new work in the wilderness.

chunks.title: Rebuke for Unfaithfulness and Promise of Forgiveness
chunks.reason: A legal argument where God rebukes Israel's lack of worship, contrasts their burden with His grace, and declares forgiveness.
